name: Face
summary: The Face class represents a single face in a solid.

methods.name: GetLoopEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets a new loop enumerator for enumerating through the face's loops.

properties.name: Normal
properties.summary: The normal vector of the face.

properties.name: OriginPartId
properties.summary: The part id of the part that this face originated from. For example, a face create by a part cut has the id of the cutting part.
